findings.issue: Missing owner or tenant filtering in invoice load
findings.evidence_span: target.md: 'loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering'
findings.recommended_fix: Add tenant_id or owner_id filtering to ensure users can only access their own invoices.

findings.issue: Sensitive invoice ID leaked in denial response
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure denial responses do not include sensitive identifiers like invoice_id; use a generic error message.
